steps.title: Decode the mathematical notation in context
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents years after the end of 1958, so $x = 5$ corresponds to the end of 1963. The function $f(x)$ models account value in dollars. Therefore, $f(5) \approx 263$ means the account value is approximately 263 dollars at the end of 1963.

steps.title: Identify the matching choice
steps.content: Choice D states: The value of the bank account is estimated to be approximately 263 dollars at the end of 1963. This is exactly our interpretation. That matches choice D — D is correct.
